verification: python3 bench/tools/validate_oracles.py -> 34/34 checks green, exit 0: recomputed every exact answer from first principles vs shipped 'expected' + prompt-drift markers, ran every pytest task's own asserts against an independent reference in a sandboxed subprocess, confirmed suite invariants (12 tasks, 3/class, 0 blind-grader, unique ids). CLI facts verified read-only in claude 2.1.201: --effort{low,medium,high,xhigh,max}, --model, --output-format json, -p present; --seed absent. Scale/cost numbers computed by bench estimate script, not fabricated results. Post-revision: doc integrity re-checked (code fences balanced, no stale cross-refs, new anchors present) and validate_oracles.py re-run 34/34 green after edits.
notes: Design-only per instructions; no benchmark/generation runs executed. Suite = 4 classes x 3 tasks, all deterministically gradeable (0 blind grader, target met). Novel content; T3b uniqueness & T4b count brute-force-verified; every date/weekday fact in oracles checked. Recommended path: run Phase 0 gate (validate --effort accepted per tier, enumerate JSON envelope token/cost fields, confirm effort modulates output tokens monotonically >=2x low->max, prove CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL unset) THEN n=3 pilot (180 runs, ~$8 API-equiv, ~2.3h sequential / ~45min @3x concurrency). Fallbacks: n=2 (120) or reduced T1+T2 (90) to shake out harness. No --seed in CLI -> run-order seeding lives in Python harness (seed 20260706); cross-run nondeterminism is the object of study (replicates). Pre-registered: NI margin delta=10pp at class level (9 trials/cell at n=3), Wilson+Newcombe CIs, bootstrap for token/savings CIs. RQ3 headline A/B (calibrated vs inheritance@xhigh vs uniform-high) is COMPUTED from the same matrix cells -- no extra runs. All est $ are API-price equivalents; real runs consume the user's subscription plan. Engineer can build bench/effort.py directly against Section 9 schemas + bench/tasks/*.json without inventing content. ABORT criteria + fallback routes (settings-file / CLAUDE_CODE_EXTRA_BODY output_config.effort) specced if Phase 0 fails. Adopted patterns cited: blind-grader (engram assessor), oracle-hierarchy (loop-protocol), receipt/effort telemetry (receipt-protocol), guarded-refit (engram FSRS). REV 2026-07-06 (post Gate-A merge; original R4 worktree cleaned up, this revision on branch wave-r/R4-refit off current main): incorporated R1 binary-forensics telemetry -- bound results JSONL to confirmed envelope fields (total_cost_usd, duration_ms, usage.{input_tokens,output_tokens,cache_creation_input_tokens,cache_read_input_tokens}, modelUsage); effort is ABSENT from cost telemetry so added Phase 0.6 effort-fidelity/downgrade check (requested==effective for all 5 tiers via capture hook) + per-run effort_requested/effort_effective fields (mismatch => cell-invalid); integer-effort noted out of scope; transcript JSONL (isSidechain) noted as future live-telemetry. Incorporated R2 literature: pre-registered H1 (easy-class equivalence via TOST) / H2 (hard-class saturation) / H3 (overthinking tail) with NI reference changed from mechanical max to empirical quality-ceiling tier; added uniform-low as 3rd RQ3 baseline with a Pareto un-dominated victory condition; added multi-agent economics para (~15x tokens, ~80% variance) and Section 11 references (Snell 2408.03314, Chen 2412.21187, Opus 4.5 announcement, multi-agent blog); framed unit-of-analysis as subagent role/class. Tasks unchanged (still 34/34 oracle-valid).
